method: Agent Harness knockout simulator: three scenario paths + group-error learning + Dixon/economic blend + advanced stats + player-impact proxies + goal-timing layer + TimesFM-inspired time-series agent + penalty shootout model. No draw is allowed in knockout outputs.

learned_knockout_adjustments.target_accuracy_note: 90% is an ambition target, not a guaranteed property; the model now reports confidence and penalty risk instead of pretending certainty.

lessons: Low group-stage hit rate: shrink overconfident favorites and increase upset sensitivity.
Draw outcomes hurt the group model; knockout conversion must treat draw mass as extra-time/penalty risk, not discard it.
Several misses assigned very low probability to the actual outcome; widen uncertainty bands before elimination matches.
learning_summary.source: Derived from outputs/accuracy_report.json completed group-stage forecast audit.

formula.two_way_logit: favorite_temperature * base_logit + stat_signal_gain * stat_edge + player_signal_gain * player_edge + timing_signal_gain * timing_edge + home_bias_delta
formula.upset_floor: base_upset_floor + upset_curve when favorite errors rise

notes: هذه الطبقة تتعلم معاملات معادلة تصحيحية من أخطاء المباريات المكتملة بدلاً من الاكتفاء بتغيير أوزان عامة.
كل تحديث بعد مباراة يحفظ نسخة جديدة من equation_version لاستخدامها في توقعات خروج المغلوب التالية.

inspired_by.note: Stable local fallback: EWMA/quantile time-series layer for GitHub Actions. If TimesFM is installed later, this file can become the adapter input/output contract without changing the dashboard.

method.series: Per-team chronological goal-difference and points signal from completed World Cup matches, enriched with advanced match stats when available.
method.forecast: Exponentially weighted momentum with volatility penalty and confidence bands. This keeps the free GitHub workflow deterministic while borrowing the TimesFM idea: recent sequence shape matters, not only static weights.

scenarios.description: يعطي وزناً أعلى للمرشح الأقوى، يقلل الفوضى، ولا يقلب مباراة إلا عند وجود هامش واضح.
النسخة الرسمية الحالية: تمزج Agent Harness مع النموذج الاقتصادي وإحصاءات البطولة والتعلم من الأخطاء واتجاهات السلاسل الزمنية.
يعظم أثر الفراشة: ركلات الترجيح، اللاعب الحاسم، الزخم المتأخر، اتجاه السلسلة الزمنية، والمفاجآت القريبة.

sources: Local audited group-stage forecast ledger and accuracy_report.json
data/match_advanced_stats.csv from ESPN-derived open match statistics where available
data/goal_timing_events.csv optional goal-minute layer; falls back to late-momentum indicators when minutes are not available
data/equation_learning.json learned equation parameters after every completed-match audit
data/time_series_forecast.json TimesFM-inspired sequence trend layer for team momentum and volatility
google-research/timesfm design idea: sequence-first forecasting; implemented here as a stable free fallback for GitHub Actions
Published Round-of-32 pairings from FIFA/beIN/Yallakora text supplied with this run
